implementing_department: Backward Classes Development Department, Government of Kerala
description: Financial assistance for pre-matric students belonging to Other Eligible Communities (OEC) studying in classes 1 to 10 in Kerala.
eligibility: Student belongs to Other Eligible Communities (OEC) or Other Equivalent Communities
Studying in Government/Aided/Recognized Unaided/CBSE/ICSE/Kendriya Vidyalaya schools in Kerala
Family income up to ₹6,00,000 for Other Equivalent Communities

steps: School authorities submit student details through the scholarship portal
Educational Officer verifies the submitted details
Approved amount is transferred via DBT

additional_notes: Students do not need to apply individually.
